prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler 340ci (6.2L) V8 (engine code: LA340) with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products (ESP 4340 steel crank, H-beam rods, and forged aluminum pistons) for a 12.5:1 compression ratio, paired with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (280H Magnum grind, 0.550" lift, 230° duration at 0.050") and ported cylinder heads by Indy Cylinder Head (CNCS-ported 340 heads with 2.02" intake/1.60" exhaust valves)

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (5.5" thick core, 3.5" inlet/out.5" outlet) and a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Stainless Works (4-into-1 headers, 3.5" dual mufflers with X-pipe)

Fuel system upgrade featuring a Holley Dominator EFI system (PN 556-112) with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700X injectors, and a custom fuel rail setup by Radium Engineering, paired with a Nitrous Express (NX) direct-port nitrous system (150hp shot, progressive controller, and dedicated fuel solenoid)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rare Fabrication Scamp GT-specific kit (hand-formed 3003 aluminum fenders, extended quarter panels, and custom rocker panels) with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes)

Suspension overhaul with a Ridetech HQ Series coilover system (double-adjustable, 2.5" monotube shocks, 450lb/in front springs, 350lb/in rear springs) and a custom subframe reinforcement kit by Detroit Speed (laser-cut 1/4" steel plates, polyurethane bushings, and adjustable panhard bar)

Exterior styling with a custom vinyl wrap by VViViD Vinyls (Matte Military Green with Gloss Black accents), custom LED taillights by Diode Dynamics (Cobra-style, sequential turn signals), and a custom hood scoop by Harwood Industries (4" cowl-induction scoop, carbon fiber construction, functional ram-air ducting)
